title: Seeded Simulation, Input Replay, State Hashes, Settings, and Save Migration · Language Clinic: Rng Streams
summary: Rendering consumes random draws, replay stores key state without timing, floats are compared as formatted text, settings overwrite atomically unsafe, and corrupted saves silently reset. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the rng streams increment in reproducible replay and versioned local state. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Inject separate seeded random streams for gameplay and cosmetic effects and record draw-order compatibility.
Offer reduced motion and effects, avoid unsafe flashes, cap screen shake, allow pause, and preserve essential alternatives.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-rng-streams — Inject separate seeded random streams for gameplay and cosmetic effects and record draw-order compatibility.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-determinism-replay-save-3
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-determinism-replay-save-3.
# Case 5798: a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial.
# Operating constraint: retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity.
# Changed case: cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity.
def worked_asteroids_determinism_replay_save_3(seed: int = 4217, input_frames: int = 3600, replay_frames: int = 3600, state_hash_equal: bool = True, schema_version: int = 2, corrupted_save_rejected: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "playerworked3",
        "seed5798",
        "input3dekrow",
        "frameworked35798",
        "state5798worked3",
        "playtest3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if seed < 0 or input_frames < 1:
        return False, input_frames, "replay-domain"
    if replay_frames != input_frames:
        return False, replay_frames, "replay-length"
    if not state_hash_equal:
        return False, replay_frames, "simulation-drift"
    if schema_version < 1 or not corrupted_save_rejected:
        return False, schema_version, "save-contract"
    assert replay_frames == input_frames
    return True, schema_version, "reproducible-run"

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-rng-streams-sjxs0g
# Competency: asteroids-rng-streams.
# Case 1980: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects.
# Changed case: cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity.
def evidence_asteroids_rng_streams_sjxs0g(seed: int = 4217, input_frames: int = 3600, replay_frames: int = 3600, state_hash_equal: bool = True, schema_version: int = 2, corrupted_save_rejected: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_sjxs0g = "sjxs0g-g0sxjs-1980"
    assert evidence_variant_sjxs0g
    evidence_axes_sjxs0g = (
        "playersjxs0g",
        "seed1980",
        "inputg0sxjs",
        "framesjxs0g1980",
        "state1980sjxs0g",
        "playtestg0sxjs1980",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_sjxs0g)) == 6
    if seed < 0 or input_frames < 1:
        return False, input_frames, "replay-domain"
    if replay_frames != input_frames:
        return False, replay_frames, "replay-length"
    if not state_hash_equal:
        return False, replay_frames, "simulation-drift"
    if schema_version < 1 or not corrupted_save_rejected:
        return False, schema_version, "save-contract"
    assert replay_frames == input_frames
    return True, schema_version, "reproducible-run"

Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Inject separate seeded random streams for gameplay and cosmetic effects and record draw-order compatibility.
